extraction.one_line_summary: KRISTOFF Alexander won a headwind bunch sprint after experience from 2016 victory positioned him perfectly when BOONEN crashed at finish.
tactical_patterns: KRISTOFF's course knowledge from prior year victory proving decisive in headwind positioning suggests stage winners return with edge.
Breakaway averaging 49km/h but maintaining only 2-3min gap indicates teams controlling tempo without committing sprinter domestiques early.

rider_signals.BOONEN Tom: negative: crashed in sprint finish, suggesting positioning error or fatigue in headwind conditions
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: translating prior venue experience into tactical positioning advantage in technical headwind sprint
